_comment: Edit this file to customise venues, time windows, and notification settings.
_email_note: Set credentials via GitHub Secrets (preferred) rather than storing them here.
For Gmail, use an App Password (https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords)
and make sure 2-Step Verification is enabled on the sending account.
_api_note: Better's booking API endpoint is discovered from browser network traffic.
If the default endpoint stops working, set slot_api_url to the correct URL
or override it with the BETTER_SLOT_API_URL environment variable.
To find it: open DevTools → Network → XHR, then navigate to a venue booking
page on better.org.uk and select a date.
